request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Write a 2-3 sentence storyline summary (≤500 chars total) of the regulatory pressure history for this prediction-market contract. For 'retrospective' kind, write past tense and reference the actual resolution. For 'active' kind, write present tense and note what's still pending. Return JSON {text: ...}.
request.user:
Contract: Will Bitcoin be above $109,999.99 by Dec 31, 2026 at 11:59 PM ET?
Kind: active
Timeline (20 events):
- 2026-05-15 [A] CME | Implementation of the Nasdaq CME Crypto Index Futures Market Maker Program | [2] — CME's market-maker program should boost futures liquidity and participation, slightly increasing the chance spot BTC exceeds $109,999.99.
- 2026-05-14 [background] CME | Implementation of the Bitcoin Volatility Futures Market Maker Program | [2] — CME’s market‑maker program affects bitcoin derivatives liquidity/volatility but has an indirect and ambiguous effect on the BTC spot reaching $109,999.
- 2026-05-13 [A] CME | Expansion of the Trading and ClearingHours for all Cryptocurrency Futures and Options on Futures Contracts. | [1] — CME expanding crypto futures trading/clearing hours boosts liquidity and price discovery, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $110k and may resolve sooner.
- 2026-05-13 [A] CME | Implementation of the Cryptocurrency Options 24/7 Weekend Market MakerProgram | [2] — Bullish: CME's 24/7 weekend market-maker program modestly increases liquidity/trading access, slightly raising odds BTC tops $109,999.99 and may speed timing.
- 2026-05-13 [A] CME | Implementation of the Cryptocurrency Futures 24/7 Weekend Market Maker Program | [2] — CME's 24/7 weekend market-maker program boosts futures liquidity and continuous price discovery, modestly raising odds BTC tops $109,999.99 — bullish.
- 2026-05-08 [A] Self-Regulatory Organizations; The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC; Notice of Filing of Proposed Rule Change, as Modified by Amendment No. 1 Thereto, to List and Trade Shares of iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF under Nasdaq Rule 5711(d) (CommodityBased Trust... — SEC notice to list BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF raises institutional access/demand, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $109,999 in 2026.
- 2026-04-21 [A] Attorney General James Sues Coinbase and Gemini for Running Illegal Gambling Platforms in New York — NY AG sues Coinbase and Gemini; reduced US exchange access/confidence likely lowers BTC demand, making >$110k less likely (medium).
- 2026-04-16 [A] COIN | Crypto Market Maker Program - 04/16/2026 — CFTC market-maker program for Coinbase derivatives could boost liquidity and institutional demand, slightly increasing odds BTC exceeds $109,999.99.
- 2026-04-16 [background] CME | Modifications to the Event Contract… - 04/16/2026 — CFTC notice of CME contract modifications likely only indirectly affects BTC price/liquidity via futures; no clear directional effect on CF RT Index.
- 2026-04-10 [A] 04/10/26 - GENIUS Act Requirements and Standards for FDIC-Supervised Permitted Payment Stablecoin Issuers (RIN 3064–AG19) — FDIC rules for permitted payment stablecoin issuers provide regulatory clarity, modestly boosting crypto liquidity and slightly raising odds BTC > $109,999.
- 2026-03-19 [A] Regulatory Capital: Category I and II Banking Organizations, Banking Organizations With Significant Trading Activity, and Optional Adoption for Other Banking Organizations — Capital rule changes tightening banks' trading activity could reduce institutional crypto holdings/trading, lowering odds BTC tops $109,999.99 in 2026.
- 2026-03-19 [A] Regulatory Capital Rule: Category I and II Banking Organizations, Banking Organizations with Significant Trading Activity, and Optional Adoption for Other Banking Organizations — FDIC capital-rule changes may curb banks' crypto trading/holdings, modestly reducing institutional demand and lowering odds BTC tops $109,999.99.
- 2026-03-12 [background] CME - Extension of the Ultra 10 Options Market Maker Program - 03/12/2026 — Extending CME's options market‑maker program may modestly boost crypto derivatives liquidity and institutional flows, slightly increasing odds BTC hits $110k.
- 2026-02-12 [A] CFE Cboe Bitcoin Continuous Futures Lead Market Maker Program Amendment [2] — CFE's amended lead-market-maker program may modestly improve futures liquidity/price discovery, slightly raising chance of spot BTC > $109,999 (bullish).
- 2026-02-03 [A] ICE US New Cryptocurrency Futures Liquidity Provider Program — CFTC-backed ICE liquidity provider program for crypto futures should improve liquidity and demand, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $109,999.99.
- 2026-02-03 [A] ICE US New Cryptocurrency Futures Market Maker Program — CFTC-backed ICE market-maker program should boost futures liquidity and institutional participation, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $109,999.
- 2026-01-29 [A] COIN | Modifications to the Perp Style Futures Market Maker Program — CFTC changes to Coinbase's perp futures market-maker program may only indirectly affect BTC liquidity/volatility, so no clear impact on >$109,999 outcome.
- 2025-12-17 [background] CME - Modifications to the Bitcoin Friday Futures Market Maker Program — CME changes to Bitcoin futures market‑maker program can affect liquidity/volatility and thus spot dynamics, but the title alone gives no clear directional effect.
- 2025-12-08 [A] Acting Chairman Pham Announces Launch of Digital Assets Pilot Program for Tokenized Collateral in Derivatives Markets — CFTC pilot to allow tokenized collateral in derivatives likely boosts institutional demand/liquidity for crypto, modestly increasing odds BTC tops $110k in 2026.
- 2025-11-18 [A] Modifications to Position Limits — CFTC changes to position limits can affect Bitcoin futures liquidity/volatility and thus spot price, but direction and magnitude are unclear.

response.text: Since late 2025, U.S. actions skew bullish: CME/ICE/CFE/Coinbase expand crypto futures, 24/7 market-maker programs and hours; Nasdaq files to list the iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF; CFTC tokenized-collateral pilots and FDIC stablecoin standards add clarity - together lifting odds BTC >$109,999.99 by end-2026. Headwinds: tighter bank capital rules and NY AG suits vs Coinbase/Gemini. Pending: SEC ETF approval and litigation outcomes.
